programme.desc: Upin, Ipin dan kawan-kawan menghabiskan cuti sekolah mereka dengan bermain pelbagai jenis permainan. Selain bermain, Upin, Ipin dan kawan-kawan telah belajar tentang seuatu dari Tok Dalang. Selepas sesi persekolahan bermula semula, Cikgu Melati minta murid-murid untuk membentangkan hasil kerja mereka. Kerja apakah yang diminta oleh Cikgu Melati itu? Saksikan jawapannya dalam episod 'Bila Cuti Seko

programme.desc: The detectives investigate a rape of an actress during a theater production.

programme.desc: The squad reels from the fallout of Capt. Cragen being arrested for the murder of an escort.

programme.desc: When a concert turns into a mob scene, a teenager is brutally assaulted; Detective Amaro ends up defending the prime suspect's reputation.

programme.desc: Ted agrees to let Barney spice up his love life, so he ends up on an adventure of flying to Philadelphia, encountering the law and visiting the Liberty Bell.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Barney go out to the clubs with Robin, as Lily and Marshall go to an adult wine and cheese party.

programme.title: Dateline

programme.desc: While being carefully monitored by the Under Secretary of the Navy due to the identification of a mole in their department, the team lands an important case involving a Syrian terrorist.

programme.desc: A feud between a famous author (Robert Vaughn) and his sixth wife, Charmaine (Marcia Cross), turns into a criminal case when Charmaine is faced with allegations of abuse; Barba winds up dealing with family drama of his own.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: During an interview on a popular TV show, a college student claims she was gang raped in a fraternity, bringing national attention to rape on campus; Benson and Barba investigate multiple suspects.

programme.desc: A woman wants to recant her testimony and free her father, who was incarcerated for incest and rape when she was a child; Capt. Cragen, who remembers the original investigation, tries to help the team.

programme.desc: Detective Rollins hopes to elicit a confession from serial killer Gregory Yates (Dallas Roberts) when a body washes up on the beach where he buried victims, but the information he provides sends shock waves through the police department.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives continue to investigate a woman's murder and dismemberment by following a lead provided by serial killer Gregory Yates.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old who was part of a group of kids who put a transgender teen in the hospital is tried as an adult, the SVU team wonders whether the punishment fits the crime.

programme.desc: An unarmed black man is shot during the pursuit of a suspect, raising racial tensions; Barba must indict the three officers involved -- who claim they followed procedure.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins' mother throws her a baby shower; the team's investigation into the rape of a violinist by her colleague leads to Rollins' fugitive sister; Sgt. Mike Dodds reports for his first day.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The search for a missing teenager takes an emotional toll on Dodds; DNA evidence could lead to the teen's abductor.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A high-school student plans a secret hookup with a female teacher, but ends up in a sinister situation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Sgt. Olivia Benson attempts to thwart a violent home invasion, she gets more than she bargains for and becomes a hostage.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of the Jurassic World theme park, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing return to the island of Isla Nublar to save the remaining dinosaurs from a volcano that's about to erupt. programme.desc: In this saga of warring clans, revenge and the ultimate martial arts skills, Yun, a young swordsman, battles the odds to avenge his father's death.

programme.title: The Merry Wife
programme.desc: Jealousy threatens to expose the secret relationship of a 17-year-old student and her 35-year-old teacher husband.

programme.desc: After a man's household pays dearly for his faith in his business rival, he turns to his swordmate and that man's son for help.

programme.desc: Director Anthony Chan joins award-winning social satirist Alfred Cheung Kin Ting in this delightful variation on the hugely successful British Carry On!

programme.title: Family Light Affair
programme.desc: Serio-comic clashes of cultures ensue when a Mainland Chinese family try to make a go of it in Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Winged Tiger
programme.desc: When villains 'Winged Tiger' Teng Fei and 'Underworld King' Yin Te Lung unite, the martial arts world is plunged into chaos. Can this deadly duo be stopped?

programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung woos a famous courtesan, indulges in some gambling and helps out earthquake victims while incognito in Suzhou.

programme.desc: 5 Shaolin rebels train hard in order to successfully defeat their Manchu enemies. Starring David Chiang, Ti Lung, Alexander Fu.

programme.desc: A clash of cultures and such ensue after Mr. Funny Bone and Big Potato open an old-fashioned healing clinic in ultra-modern Hong Kong.

programme.desc: Chiang Li Ping plays a scorned wife, while Elaine Chin Yen Ling is the mistress who teaches the hypocritical husband that what goes around, comes around.

programme.desc: The film's curious title refers to two props that signal a happy beginning to what develops into a tragic love story, linking a scholar and a local beauty.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 238

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 312

Kanmani Anbudan
programme.desc: Kanmani and Vennila are thick friends despite being from different backgrounds. What happens when Anbu falls for Vennila while Kanmani develops feelings for him too?

programme.title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
programme.desc: This drama follows the journey of a bold young woman who shies away from the idea of marriage due to haunting past experiences. Her life takes an unexpected turn when a local thug enters her world.

programme.title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
programme.desc: The story follows Sudar, a bright and emotionally intuitive 10-year-old born in prison, as she steps into the outside world and discovers its realities.

programme.title: Happy Wife Happy Life
programme.desc: A light-hearted reality competition where popular television personalities and their real-life partners participate in fun-filled challenges, music rounds, and games to test their compatibility.

programme.title: Sindhu Bairavi
programme.desc: Catch what unfolds next when two polar opposite of people falls in love.

programme.title: Onna Irukka Kaththukkanum
programme.desc: Kandhasamy, is an orthodox patriarch running a traditional vegetarian mess alongside his close-knit family. Their conservative lives are turned upside down by Indira, a progressive and independent woman.

programme.title: Thaai Maaman
programme.desc: After serving 14 years for a violent feud, a man returns to his village seeking peace and proposes a marriage between his son and his sworn enemy's daughter to end generations of hatred.

programme.title: Azhage Azhagu
programme.desc: A family drama revolving around the lives of two daughters-in-law and how they navigate their roles and relationships within the household.

programme.title: Pandian Stores 2
programme.desc: Santhamurthy marries Gomathi against her family's wishes. Gomathi's brothers consider Santhamurthy as their enemy. However, Gomathi maintains a secretive relationship with her family.

programme.title: Ayyanar Thunai
programme.desc: Get ready to embark on a journey of faith and heroism! A story that will keep you on the edge of your seat with every twist and turn.

programme.title: Siragadikka Aasai
programme.desc: Meena marries Muthukumar without her full heart. Muthukumar hates love due to his past. Will Muthukumar understand and accept Meena? Will Meena achieve her dreams?

programme.title: Chinna Marumagal
programme.desc: The story revolves around Tamilselvi as she struggles to navigate challenging situations in her in-laws' house, all while being a clueless teenager.

programme.title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
programme.desc: Karikalan, a retired Tamil professor and a strict patriarch, whose perfectly disciplined world is shaken when the hidden love lives of his three sons come to light.

Ireland's Ben Healy won his first ever stage at this point last year after he finished first in a stage that saw the cyclists ride 201.5km from Bayeux to Vire Normandie. The Irishman's victory at this point moved him up to eighth in the overall general classification.

programme.title: The Gruppetto

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Tampa Bay Rays v New York Yankees (Start-time 6.10pm). Coverage of the American League match from George M. Steinbrenner Field, as the two sides play the fourth and final game of the series. They last faced each other in New York in May when a three-match series was reduced to two games because of bad weather. The Rays won the first game 4-2 before the Yankees fought back to win the next game 2-0.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: St. Louis Cardinals v Milwaukee Brewers (Start-time 12.45am). Coverage of the National League match from Busch Stadium, as the teams play the fourth of five games. They last met in Milwaukee at the end of May as the Brewers used their home advantage to win a three-match contest 3-0. 5-1, 6-0 and 2-1 victories continued their good run of form against the Cardinals.

programme.desc: A couple in love survive suicide attempts after the boy's father sends his henchmen to kill the girl. After their separation, he finds her again in the city but things do not work in their favour.

programme.desc: Vellaisamy Gounder is a village chief who is in favour of casteism. He forbids the romantic relationship between Deivanai and the village doctor when the latter refuses to reveal his caste.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep02
programme.desc: Pak Atan membawa Didi, Nana, & Jojo menaiki van ke festival muzik. Dalam perjalanan, mereka tersangkut dalam kesesakan lalu lintas. Mereka singgah di stesen minyak dan Aera datang mengetuk tingkap menyapa.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep03
programme.desc: Aera kini telah menjadi sebahagian daripada kembara ke festival muzik. Dalam episod ini, mereka singgah rumah Tatak untuk menjemputnya ke festival muzik. Mereka mula mengenali ahli keluarga Tatak.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep04
programme.desc: Setelah lama berada di dalam perjalanan, mereka mulai lapar. Pak Atan membawa mereka ke kawasan kendera saji. Ada beraneka jenis makanan yang dijual, tetapi Nana pula tak pasti nak makan apa.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep05
programme.desc: Pak Atan buat keputusan untuk singgah makan di kedai kawan lamanya, Pak Sumbu. Didi, Nana, Jojo, dan Aera berat hati untuk mencuba sayur kangkung. Pak Sumbu menarik selera mereka dengan menu istimewa.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep06
programme.desc: Van Pak Atan tiba-tiba rosak. Pak Atan kehairanan kerana vannya baru sahaja diservis. Aera mula rasa tidak sedap hati. Pak Atan meninggalkan Didi, Nana, Jojo, Bingo dan Aera untuk mencari bantuan.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep01
programme.desc: Didi dan kawan-kawannya bertemu Prof Gogo yang memperkenalkan Kad Cita-Cita Impian. Apabila Jojo meletakkan kad angkasawan, mereka terus masuk ke dunia angkasa dan perlu menyelesaikan misi.

programme.title: Super Wings S7: Super Pets Adventure Ep06
programme.desc: The Super Wings are upping their saving game with incredible new powers and equipment to become heroic protectors and defenders. They become World Guardians!

programme.title: Robocar POLI S5 Ep14
